Subject: Fwd: Question from Fortune Magazine

Hi Leslie:

Could you please forward the below to JEE, and ask
him if he wants me to
talk to this person?

I'm currently in the backwoods of nowhere, in rural
Quebec (along with
my family and approximately 100,000 mosquitoes, in
the immediate
vicinity, right now). Yes, it's a fancy retreat with
a superb
restaurant, etc., but it's really in the middle of
nowhere... My cell
works, and I can set up a time to talk to Jeffrey,
if he likes.

Thanks much.

s.
